title: How to Build an AI Agent with Claude Code (Claude AI Agent Tutorial)
summary: Tutorial on building AI agents using Claude Desktop with emphasis on proper structure, planning mode, and decision processes. Covers workspace setup, CLAUDE.md configuration, and common failure modes in agent implementation.
writeup: This tutorial walks through building AI agents with Claude Code, focusing on structure rather than ad hoc prompting. It covers workspace setup, CLAUDE.md configuration, and Plan Mode, and it situates these within agentic workflows and decision processes that include uncertainty quantification. The practical payoff is a repeatable setup: a configured workspace, a CLAUDE.md file that guides the agent, and awareness of common failure modes in agent implementation.
